patterns: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS (load_bids, load_contracts)

DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS before every CREATE TRIGGER (updated_at on load_bids, load_contracts)
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION (is_verified_load_board_participant, is_broker_company, is_carrier_company, generate_load_contract)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, ALTER ENABLE RLS (no-op if already enabled)
